response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content: 00:00 to 03:14 is dialogue/skit. 03:15 onwards is a vocal performance.
2. Identified song "ちゅ、多様性。" (Chu, Tayousei.) via on-screen text starting at 03:15.
3. Search strategy: "[Song Title]" [Original Artist] "Japanese and English lyrics" -> '"ちゅ、多様性。" ano lyrics Japanese and English'.
4. Found lyrics on kgasa.com.
5. Populated scene data including performer (Fuwamoco) and resolved song metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a skit and dialogue between two virtual characters (Fuwamoco) and a human presenter, followed by a musical performance of the song "ちゅ、多様性。" (Chu, Tayousei.).

Musical performance of "ちゅ、多様性。" by Fuwamoco on stage.
